title: Shy Keenan
excerpt: Hello you :0) I really want us to start off on the right foot, so here’s a little bit more about me, before you just go right ahead...
content: Hello you :0) I really want us to start off on the right foot, so here’s a little bit more about me, before you just go right ahead ..and fall madly ‘in like’ with me. Born and broken in Birkenhead Merseyside (in 1963) I am described by many as ‘three times stronger than any household bleach’ ..mostly because of my natural born ‘Phoenix spirit’. Born Karen, changed to Peeta to hide from the abusers, then later to Shy to stand up to them. My abusers did not make me this strong, I was born this strong, they just tested that strength ..and lost. I’m a housebound disabled wheelchair user (hip & lung) who also manages Civilian Post Traumatic Stress, both act to limit my physical mobility in their own special ways, that said, I have full worldwide digital mobility via my ‘Virtual Office’. “I started out with nothing and still have most of that left.” As an orphaned broken kid in (don’t) Care, I came through the three metric inches of education I did get ‘completely uneducated’, but I’m a fast learning hard worker, who, despite the lifelong challenges ..likes to use what bits of me still works, to earn my own way through life ..and as a person, if I’m ‘in the race’ I like to win, As an adult Asexual, Areligious, Apolictical human female I am both passive and aggressive ..I’m Bi-Furious. Broken as I am, I still know the difference between right and wrong, good and bad and I work hard every day, to live a good life worth living, as a person who sincerely, wholeheartedly believes in that wonderful old saying ..whatever doesn’t kill me …had better start running. I believe all human people have good and bad in us ..my faith is firmly placed in the good and potential good in me and in the good in others. I have come to learn that ‘the only way bad people prevail, is when good people do nothing, so I try hard not to be a nothing doer. I’ve also learnt that hate destroys everything, never fixes a thing ..that we can’t beat bad ‘with bad’, that the only way to stop it, is to find a way to tell ..and that the very best revenge, is to survive ..and survive well.” Despite my lack of academia and the mobility challenges ..I went on to become an awarded advocate for those whose lives had been victimised by paedophile crimes ..awarded by the British Prime Minister, I was the first ever Britain’s Children’s Champion, I was one of Britain’s Bravest Women, a Most Inspirational Woman, a Wonder Woman and even a Woman Of The Year, also, a qualified Detective and an International Bestselling Author. I’m a respected AVP Consultant who works well with commercial companies/TV/Film/Media. I have some writer/song writing and artistic skills, I make model film sets and am currently developing an AR/VR App and Game. For more about me and my Phoenix work .. click here ..this is a work in progress, thank you for your patience :0) Shy ..nth

title: H&G AR/VR App/Game
excerpt: The House & Garden AR/VR App/Game is essentially a management tool made for & by those who manage Civilian Post Trau...
content: The House & Garden AR/VR App/Game is essentially a management tool made for & by those who manage Civilian Post Traumatic Stress. Sep 2016 – Giving our time voluntarily and with the help of our incredibly kind and wonderful ‘Phoenix Friends’ I started building a miniature version of our CPTS/Disabled friendly House & Garden, to help us demonstrate (by design) how much more can be done for our kind, to be able to do much more for ourselves. We’d never done anything like this before , however, once we got started, it was then quickly suggested that we turned the miniature model into a 360 AR/VR App/Game. We’ve never done anything like that before either, despite that, we agreed :0) With help and support from the very best mentors, we are learning as we go and loving every bit of it and are sticking strictly to our ‘Four P Plan’ to completion. September 2017 .. we are now working on raising the funds needed to ‘patent and develop’ the H&G AR/VR App/Game so that we can sell it to game makers/distributors, we built the ‘working playscale Phoenix Kitchen’ to help us do that, we’ll update everyone as we go ..

title: Me & My CPTS
excerpt: My Personal CPTS Management Tool List. My name is Shy Keenan and I have managed severe Civilian Post Traumatic Stress now for almost all of...
content: My Personal CPTS Management Tool List. My name is Shy Keenan and I have managed severe Civilian Post Traumatic Stress now for almost all of my life. I’m developing this page, so do pop back for updates. There will be links to products I use or recommend, that help me manage my Civilian Post Traumatic Stress or CPTS. They’ll also be some links to other peoples products I’d like to see into developed ‘CPTS bespoke’ versions of … Before we get started, must make a few things clear ..and there are some rules. 1/ CPTS CAN KILL! No one patient is the same, there is no ‘one glove fits all’. It is, in my opinion, first and foremost ‘a medical condition’ that can, if not properly treated, trigger and exacerbate life-threatening medical and mental health conditions. 2/ I’m a patient NOT a Doctor ..who is the only person who should be diagnosing/establishing/managing/changing your CPTS treatment, ever. 3/ I manage my CPTS medical condition with the support of my NHS medical professional care team. a/ I develop my own (drug-free) CPTS management tools. b/ I work with product makers to develop CPTS friendly versions of their products, to what are in fact ..millions of CPTS managers … c/ I work to help educate the NHS on what really helps our Civilian CPTS kind. 4/ Free is always warmly welcome, however, there can be no sponsor on this page. This page is only for what I know works specifically for me and my CPTS. That said, whilst we are all very different, we do have some things in common and I want to use this page to share (with others like me) information about ‘what really helps’ me to manage my CPTS. …. Below are some pics & links for products I wish could be prescribed instead of drugs and other products that have turned out to be must have CPTS management tools … Shapemaster’s daily ‘Power Assisted Exercise’ Foscam allows you to see and speak to whoever is at your door before you open it. Would love to see these Orrbs in every public building and NHS p rescribed these to our CPTS kind. My PTSD needs sunshine, even when the sun doesn’t shine. Kitchen Garden – I use ‘Weapons Of Mass Distraction’ to help me manage my PTSD. I use many ‘Weapons Of Mass Distraction’ to help me manage my PTSD, like art. About my PTSD Mobility. My PTSD likes to know who is on the phone before I answer it. An Aroma Diffuser helps me manage what my PTSD can smell. When my PTSD needs me to control my body temperature fast. Music – More brilliant ‘Weapons Of Mass Distraction’ to help me manage my PTSD. My PTSD fully supports Civilian PTSD Service Dogs. For when my PTSD needs me to manage what I see & hear. The future of managing what my PTSD can see & hear. My hyper sensitive PTSD skin doesn’t like ‘on skin’ products or mossy bites, so I use the products from the Linked Supply team .

title: Shy Music
excerpt: Many years ago now, I performed as a singer in some incredible venues like ‘The London Hippodrome’ and the renowned ‘Jazz Caf...
content: Many years ago now, I performed as a singer in some incredible venues like ‘The London Hippodrome’ and the renowned ‘Jazz Café’. My real passion is and has always been ‘song writing’. I’ve written, produced and arranged my own songs featuring some brilliant singers ..music is my happy place..

title: The Phoenix Post
excerpt: Digital Mobility Sara and I retired as advocates in 2017, we continue to work voluntariy for The Phoenix Post (registered Not...
content: Digital Mobility Sara and I retired as advocates in 2017, we continue to work voluntariy for The Phoenix Post (registered Not For Profit) with regards to our #ThinkHuman work and for the development of our House & Garden AR/VR App/Game, a managemnt tool made for and by those who manage Civilan Post Traumatic Stress.

title: Love Is Love
excerpt: I feel I was blessed to become the parent of LGBTQ twins, the core centre of an unspeakable joy that came into my life when they did. As they gre...
content: I feel I was blessed to become the parent of LGBTQ twins, the core centre of an unspeakable joy that came into my life when they did. As they grew into wonderful young human beings, that joy was very quickly accompanied by a deep sense of dread and foreboding for two kind and sweet little humans, just trying to find their place in a society that (to them) just wants to hate them out of existence. My son Ayden was only just 14 years old ..he was just trying to get an education when he was bullied out of living ..by socially groomed religious hate-filled homophobic bigotry and a systemic failure by the education authorities to protect our LGBTQ children at school. I understand that you can’t beat hate with hate (it likes it) for me, hating them back feels like surrender, my own personal faith in human good ..could never do that. So, we (Ayden’s family and friends) set about lawfully and peacefully trying to change things for the better. So many good people stepped up to support the call for an ‘Ayden’s Law’. Ayden’s Law – We did indeed have some wonderful support, but also, sadly, many broken promises by those we trusted. However, on this agonising journey, we had managed to change many minds and social policies along the way, that helped to bring about some of the positive changes happened for our LGBTQ children trying to get an education with fear, offering us some hope that his tragic death was not in vein. Since Ayden’s death in 2013, we have worked hard to make sure that real change is on the way ..there is so much more to say, just give us time, we’ll get there, Ayden’s family Good Bless
